productDisplayName: Levis Kids Girl's Denise Pink Teens Kidswear
description: CompositionBaby pink dress with an asymmetrical cut and round neck, made of 100% cotton with mauve piping, embroidered and printed chest graphiti, button panel on both sides of the shoulder, mauve bow at the back and soft elastic gathering at the backFittingRegular36 cm Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water, colour will bleed Use mild detergent Dry cleaning possible Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Dry flat inside out in shade Iron at medium setting only Iron on reverse Wash before wearing See your little one sprint around and look like her favourite doll in this pretty pink dress. The combination of fruity yellow and bubble gum pink chest print with orange stitch detailing and embroidered branding in the same colour add a spunk to this leisure dress. Team this with comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
